channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HINDALCO] Hindalco Industries' Subsidiary, Novelis Inc., Enters $225 Million Municipal Bond Offering
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hindalco Industries Ltd. announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Novelis Inc., has entered into a Material Definitive Agreement. Novelis has filed a Form 8-K with respect to a $225 million municipal bond offering. The filing is accessible on Novelis' website and the Company's website. This information is also available under Regulation 30 of the Securities Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and is digitally signed by Geetika Anand, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer of Hindalco Industries Limited.

  • Hindalco Industries' subsidiary, Novelis Inc., enters into a Material Definitive Agreement
  • Novelis Inc. files a Form 8-K for a $225 million municipal bond offering
  • The filing is available on Novelis' and the Company's websites
  • Information is disclosed under Regulation 30 of the Securities Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
  • Geetika Anand, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer of Hindalco Industries Limited, digitally signs the disclosure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDALCO INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [ELECTCAST] Electrosteel Castings Ltd: No Control Over Significant Increase in Securities Volume
item.description:
Electrosteel Castings Ltd has submitted a reply to a clarification regarding a significant increase in the volume of the company's securities. The company states that this increase is market-driven and beyond their control. They also confirm their awareness of disclosure obligations and commitment to timely disclosure of any required events or information under Regulation 30 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Electrosteel Castings Ltd reports a significant increase in securities volume
  • The increase is market-driven and beyond the company's control
  • The company confirms their awareness of disclosure obligations
  • They commit to timely disclosure of required events or information
  • This disclosure is in response to a clarification from BSE

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELECTROSTEEL CASTINGS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RANEHOLDIN] Rane Holdings Ltd Subsidiary Faces Penalty from Income Tax Department
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rane Holdings Ltd has announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Rane Steering Systems Private Limited (RSSL), has received an order from the Income Tax Department National Faceless Assessment Centre imposing a penalty. This penalty is in relation to the addition made in the reassessment proceedings under Section 147 of the Income Tax Act, 1961 for the Assessment Year 2015-16 (Financial Year 2014-15). The penalty amount is Rs. 3.63 Crores and the tax demand is Rs. 6.74 Crores. RSSL is planning to contest this penalty and will file an appeal with the Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals) within the prescribed time limits.

  • Rane Holdings Ltd's subsidiary, Rane Steering Systems Private Limited (RSSL), has received a penalty order from the Income Tax Department National Faceless Assessment Centre.
  • The penalty is in relation to the addition made in the reassessment proceedings under Section 147 of the Income Tax Act, 1961 for the Assessment Year 2015-16 (Financial Year 2014-15).
  • The penalty amount is Rs. 3.63 Crores and the tax demand is Rs. 6.74 Crores.
  • RSSL is planning to contest this penalty and will file an appeal with the Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals) within the prescribed time limits.
  • The Income Tax Appellate Tribunal had remanded the appeal back to the Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals) to consider the merits of the case and adjudicate the matter, but the penalty order has been passed without considering this.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RANE HOLDINGS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [ARKADE] Promoter of Arkade Developers Ltd Acquires 1,00,000 Equity Shares
item.description:
Arkade Developers Ltd has disclosed under SEBI PIT Regulation 2015 that its Promoter, Amit Mangilal Jain, has acquired 1,00,000 equity shares constituting 0.05% of the total paid-up capital. This acquisition was made on the National Stock Exchange of India through a market purchase. The average price per share was Rs. 108.34.

  • Promoter of Arkade Developers Ltd acquires 1,00,000 equity shares
  • Acquisition constitutes 0.05% of the total paid-up capital
  • Transaction executed on the National Stock Exchange of India
  • Purchase made through market purchase
  • Average price per share was Rs. 108.34

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Arkade Developers Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PARAGONF] Paragon Finance Ltd. to Discontinue Mrs. Rupal Patel as Secretarial Auditor, Approve Mr. Altab Uddin Kazi's Appointment
item.description:
Paragon Finance Ltd. has informed the BSE that a Board of Directors meeting is scheduled on 19/03/2026. The meeting will consider the discontinuation of Mrs. Rupal Patel as Secretarial Auditor and the appointment of Mr. Altab Uddin Kazi as the new Secretarial Auditor for the Financial Year 2025-26. The meeting will take place at the company's registered office in Kolkata, West Bengal, India.

  • Paragon Finance Ltd. to consider the discontinuation of Mrs. Rupal Patel as Secretarial Auditor
  • Appointment of Mr. Altab Uddin Kazi as the new Secretarial Auditor for the F.Y 2025-26
  • Meeting scheduled on 19/03/2026
  • Meeting to take place at the company's registered office in Kolkata, West Bengal, India

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PARAGON FINANCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ITDCEM] Sad Demise of Non-Executive Independent Director Mr. Pankaj Inderchand Jain at Cemindia Projects Ltd
item.description:
Cemindia Projects Ltd has announced the demise of its Non-Executive Independent Director, Mr. Pankaj Inderchand Jain (DIN: 00173513) on 12th March, 2026. Mr. Jain was appointed to the Board of Directors on 31st October, 2018 and was reappointed for a second term on 31st October, 2023. His vision, guidance, and active participation in Board and Committee Meetings were highly beneficial for the company. His unexpected demise is a significant loss for the company. The company expresses its deep sorrow and heartfelt condolences to his family during this difficult time.

  • Demise of Non-Executive Independent Director Mr. Pankaj Inderchand Jain
  • Appointed to the Board of Directors on 31st October, 2018
  • Reappointed for a second term on 31st October, 2023
  • Significant contributions to the company during his tenure
  • Company expresses deep sorrow and condolences to his family

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ITD CEMENTATION INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AURUM] Aurum PropTech Exits Non-Core Assets for INR 112 Crores, Builds War Chest to Scale AI-Driven PropTech
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aurum PropTech Limited has approved the sale of Buildings Q5 and Q6 at Millennium Business Park, Navi Mumbai, for a total consideration of INR 112 Crores. The transaction is part of Aurum PropTech’s broader strategic shift toward AI-driven PropTech platforms. The proceeds from the transaction will strengthen Aurum’s growing AI investment pool and support the accelerated development of intelligent digital infrastructure for the real estate sector. The assets have an approximate book value of INR 27 Crores, and the transaction will generate a substantial profit, thereby enhancing the Group’s profitability metrics and strengthening its balance sheet. Following the completion of the transaction, Aurum PropTech is expected to become debt-free.

  • Aurum PropTech is exiting non-core assets for INR 112 Crores.
  • The proceeds will strengthen Aurum’s AI investment pool and support the development of intelligent digital infrastructure.
  • The transaction will generate a substantial profit and enhance the Group’s profitability metrics.
  • Following the completion of the transaction, Aurum PropTech is expected to become debt-free.
  • The transaction is part of Aurum PropTech’s broader strategic shift toward AI-driven PropTech platforms.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aurum PropTech Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [GOLDIAM] Goldiam International Ltd. Announces Inter-se Transfer of Shares Amongst Promoter Group
item.description:
Goldiam International Ltd. has announced an inter-se transfer of equity shares amongst the promoter group through an off-market transaction by way of gift. The shares, earlier held solely by Mrs. Shobhnaben Manharkumar Bhansali, are now held jointly with Mr. Rashesh Manhar Bhansali. This transaction falls within the exemption under Regulation 10(1)(a)(i) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and does not require an open offer under Regulation 3 of the said Regulations.

  • Inter-se transfer of shares amongst promoter and promoter group.
  • Shares held jointly by Mrs. Shobhnaben Manharkumar Bhansali and Mr. Rashesh Manhar Bhansali.
  • Transaction falls under the exemption provided under Regulation 10(1)(a)(i) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Does not require an open offer under Regulation 3 of the said Regulations.
  • No change in the aggregate shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOLDIAM INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [VIRTUALS] Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd Approves Preferential Issue of Equity Shares for Acquisitions Worth Rs. 3,50,00,000/- and Rs. 92,94,720/-
item.description:
Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has approved the preferential issue of equity shares to shareholders of Agnetta International Private Limited and Empyrean Spirits Private Limited. The total investment for the acquisition of 100% stake in Agnetta International Private Limited is Rs. 3,50,00,000/- and for the acquisition of remaining 2% stake in Empyrean Spirits Private Limited is Rs. 92,94,720/-. The equity shares will be issued at a price of Rs. 24/- each, being the price determined in accordance with SEBI ICDR Regulations, 2018. The Board has also approved the Draft Notice of Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Company to be held on Monday, April 06, 2026.

  • Kati Patang Lifestyle Ltd approves preferential issue of equity shares for acquisitions worth Rs. 3,50,00,000/- and Rs. 92,94,720/-
  • Acquisition of 100% stake in Agnetta International Private Limited for Rs. 3,50,00,000/-
  • Acquisition of remaining 2% stake in Empyrean Spirits Private Limited for Rs. 92,94,720/-
  • Issue price of equity shares set at Rs. 24/- each
  • Approval of Draft Notice of Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) of the Company to be held on Monday, April 06, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VIRTUALSOFT SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HCLTECH] HCLTech Expands Strategic Collaboration with Google Cloud to Accelerate Agentic AI Adoption
item.description:
🔥 Trending

HCLTech, a leading global technology company, has announced the expansion of its strategic collaboration with Google Cloud to help accelerate enterprise adoption of Agentic AI. The collaboration aims to build custom AI agents for global clients, strengthen collaboration and security through Google Workspace, and unlock new market opportunities, introduce innovative capabilities, and boost operational efficiency. The expanded collaboration includes solution innovation, an Agentic Center of Excellence, Gemini Experience Zones, and talent development.

  • HCLTech to use Gemini Enterprise and Gemini models to build custom AI agents for global clients
  • Strengthening collaboration and security through Google Workspace
  • Launching Physical AI innovation hubs at key global locations
  • Expanding its Google Cloud-certified workforce from 12,000 to over 35,000 within three years
  • Collaboration aims to unlock new market opportunities, introduce innovative capabilities, and boost operational efficiency

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HCL TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Investment
